sources.label: Onconetix to acquire Realbotix LLC, all-stock share exchange (BusinessWire, Feb 12, 2026)
Onconetix Form 425: Realbotix to deliver 19 robots in 2026 (StockTitan)
Realbotix delivery update incl. first Vinci-equipped robot to Ericsson (GlobeNewswire, Apr 2, 2026)
Realbotix Las Vegas facility expansion, relocation completing by end of June 2026 (StockTitan)

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news since June 6 and the tape is flat today (-0.05%); yesterday's verdict already de-rated it from #2 to #3 for micro-cap scale and commercialization risk, and nothing new justifies a second move. The -35.8% YTD drawdown with the Onconetix Nasdaq path and delivery cadence intact keeps the asymmetry, hence slight positive drift rather than further cuts.
verdicts.bull: A $50M-cap pure-play humanoid name with 19 robots delivered/delivering, an Ericsson enterprise reference, and a 75-90% ownership stake in a Nasdaq-listed combined company closing in H2 2026 - the uplisting alone could rerate liquidity and visibility.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis is intact but unconfirmed since the April delivery update; the stock drifts near $0.21 awaiting the Onconetix shareholder vote and the end-of-June Las Vegas facility relocation, neither of which has produced fresh datapoints this week.
verdicts.bear: Sub-$0.25 OTC micro-cap with trivial revenue versus a stated $100M/quarter aspiration; the share exchange is conditional on Onconetix shareholder approval and its cash position, and any deal slippage or dilution leaves holders in an illiquid, cash-burning shell exposure.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Onconetix share-exchange closing and Nasdaq listing of the combined company in H2 2026, plus completion of the Las Vegas facility relocation by end of June.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Deal break or delay in the Onconetix transaction (shareholder approval, net-cash sliding scale), leaving an illiquid OTC micro-cap with execution and financing risk.
